creator: rootservice@gmail.com
text:
According to upstrean [1] [2] MySQL 5.5 on FreeBSD is End-of-Life since August 2015. As MariaDB and Percona share the same codebase, they are also affected by uptreams EoL.

As it is a FreeBSD policy to remove such ports, i request removing following ports and to advise users to use supported versions:


databases/mysql55-client    -> use 5.6 instead
databases/mysql55-server    -> use 5.6 instead
databases/mariadb55-client  -> use 10.0 instead
databases/mariadb55-server  -> use 10.0 instead
databases/percona55-client  -> use 5.6 instead
databases/percona55-server  -> use 5.6 instead
databases/py-MySQLdb55      -> use 5.6 instead

[1] https://www.mysql.com/support/supportedplatforms/database.html
[2] https://www.mysql.com/support/eol-notice.html
